headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Jacobs Solutions, Raises Price Target to $171
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Sabahat Khan   maintains Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $169 to $171.
